testcase.name: Cache-Busting Strategy › Deployed version is immediately visible

failure.message: cache-busting.spec.js:11:3 Deployed version is immediately visible

testcase.failure:

testcase.name: Cache-Busting Strategy › Multiple rapid refreshes show consistent version

testcase.name: Cache-Busting Strategy › Browser cache invalidation works correctly
testcase.system-out: 🗑️ Testing browser cache invalidation... 🎮 Waiting for game to be ready... ✅ Three.js loaded ✅ Game ready for testing (742ms) 🎮 Waiting for game to be ready... ✅ Three.js loaded ✅ Game ready for testing (551ms) Load time comparison: { first: [33m674[39m, second: [33m403[39m, difference: [33m-271[39m }

testcase.name: Cache-Busting Strategy › CDN cache bypassing works
testcase.system-out: 🌐 Testing CDN cache bypassing... Testing strategy: timestamp Testing strategy: version Testing strategy: random Testing strategy: combined

testcase.name: Cache-Busting Strategy › iOS Safari cache clearing simulation
